query: SELECT id, name, SUBSTRING(description, 1, 500) as desc_preview FROM suppliers WHERE name LIKE '%Gold Medal%' OR name LIKE '%Celebrity%' LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT id, name, SUBSTRING(description, 1, 500) as desc_preview FROM suppliers WHERE name LIKE '%Gold Medal%' OR name LIKE '%Celebrity%' LIMIT 5;

rows.name: Royal Caribbean | Celebrity Cruises
rows.desc_preview: Chill on a golden Mediterranean beach. Go wild in an emerald rainforest. Explore spectacular fjords and ancient glaciers. Pan for gold, swim with whale sharks or shop in Santorini. Whether the New or the Old World beckons, we take you to https://www.royalcaribbean.com/gbr/en/cruise-destinations, immersing you in the region’s culture, so you can do life like a local.

messages: Gold Medal, one of the UK’s leading long-haul specialists with over 45 years of experience creating exceptional tailor-made holidays across the globe. From idyllic Indian Ocean escapes and luxury beachfront retreats to epic multi-centre adventures across the USA, Asia, Australia, and beyond, Gold Medal offers an unbeatable portfolio designed to suit every client and every budget.
Check your mood and pick your place. Get on island time and unwind on some of the best beaches in the world. Venture deep into the
stdout:
id name desc_preview 323 Gold Medal
  • Trade Only *

Gold Medal, one of the UK’s leading long-haul specialists with over 45 years of experience creating exceptional tailor-made holidays across the globe. From idyllic Indian Ocean escapes and luxury beachfront retreats to epic multi-centre adventures across the USA, Asia, Australia, and beyond, Gold Medal offers an unbeatable portfolio designed to suit every client and every budget.
